phase: 8F read-only school assignment and presentation-derived utilization frontend integration
ui_components_updated: SelectedParcelSchoolAssignmentPanel shows assignment plus presentation-derived utilization for each assigned level.
SchoolConstraintSummaryPanel shows assignment summary plus utilization seed count, provisional distribution, and seed reference-review rows.

sample_result.elementary: Carl A Furr ES, 95% utilization, presentation-derived, needs verification
sample_result.middle: Roberta Road MS, 72% utilization, presentation-derived, needs verification, unmatched reference review
sample_result.high: Jay M Robinson HS, 81% utilization, presentation-derived, needs verification

selected_parcel_school_assignment_behavi.missing_assignment_behavior: Displayed as Outside CCS V1 scope or assignment review needed, not as an app error.

presentation_utilization_display_behavio.score_policy: school_constraint_score null displays as Not scored and is never rendered as 0.
presentation_utilization_display_behavio.capacity_policy: Official capacity remains Capacity Data Needed; presentation utilization is not labeled official capacity.

capacity_caveat_wording: Capacity/enrollment data has not been added yet. This parcel is not scored for school capacity pressure.
Utilization values shown here are presentation-derived from SY 2024-2025 planning maps and require verification.
Official school capacity scoring is not active because verified enrollment/capacity data has not been added.

validation_results.npm_run_typecheck: passed after next build regenerated .next/types; initial pre-build run failed because .next/types/app files were missing
validation_results.backend_validation: not run; backend files were not modified

smoke_test_results.npm_run_dev_cfs: passed; FastAPI and Next.js started and launcher API checks returned 200
smoke_test_results.browser_check: Selected sample parcel from top search, opened Due Diligence, school card displayed assignments, Capacity Data Needed, Not scored, and presentation-derived utilization with no browser console errors observed.

remaining_blockers_before_official_capac: Verified official enrollment data is still needed.
Verified functional capacity data is still needed.
Grade-level enrollment and projection data remain future inputs.
Remaining unmatched presentation seed rows need source/reference review before official use.
scope_preserved: No TopNav, parcel search, or SceneView changes made.
No enrollment/capacity values or school capacity scores were fabricated.
No school point distance assignment was introduced.
